g.text: By signing on page 2 of this form I acknowledge that:
(a) the insurer may share the information on this claim with the treating provider, the
policyholder, the policyholder's broker, and any third-party administrator as reasonably
necessary to adjudicate this claim;
(b) the insurer may contact me at the address, email, or telephone number on record to
request additional information, and failure to respond within 30 days may result in delay
or denial of the claim;
(c) knowingly submitting false information in this form may be a criminal offense under
applicable law and may result in claim denial and contract termination;
(d) amounts settled and paid under this claim are subject to the policy terms and conditions
in effect on the treatment date, including all attached riders, endorsements, and network
designations;
(e) I have read and understood the policy accumulator values applicable to this claim,
including annual deductibles, coinsurance percentages, and out-of-pocket maxima.
☑ Original invoice / itemised bill from provider
☑ Proof of payment (where reimbursement is requested)
☑ Medical report or doctor's certificate confirming diagnosis
☐ Prescription(s) (if medications claimed)
☐ Hospital discharge summary (for inpatient claims)
☐ Referral letter (for specialist visits, where required)
Reference assigned: MP26060217252
Routing queue: Actisure / TSS Americas Health
Validation result: ALL DOCS COMPLETED — Claim can be sent to Actisure
